bead.title: test: close link and named-query contract gaps
bead.description:
Context: STP-070 through STP-077 include UNTESTED rows around link candidates, neighbor listing, GraphQL/MCP named query exposure, ready queue query behavior, schema-declared named query diagnostics, ad-hoc query budgets, policy parity, and stable CONTRACT-007 errors. These prove the simple structured data interface from the PRD.

In-scope files: `crates/axon-api/`, `crates/axon-cypher/`, `crates/axon-graphql/`, and `crates/axon-server/tests/` contract tests directly covering STP-070..077.
Out-of-scope: L5 benchmark thresholds, which are covered by the benchmark bead.
Implementation hint: add table-driven planner/error tests for CONTRACT-007 codes, and GraphQL/MCP parity tests for named query exposure and execution; cite each new assertion with canonical `@covers` tags.
bead.acceptance:
1. `cargo test -p axon-cypher` passes.
2. `cargo test -p axon-server --test graphql_consumer_parity` passes.
3. `cargo test -p axon-server --test mcp_contract` passes.
4. The executable @covers scanner reports coverage for all STP-070..077 rows changed by this bead.
5. No STP-070..077 row is marked COVERED without a passing cited test.
